key_caveats: Component A (starter alone) carries ~75% of signal
Component B (bullpen alone) adds ~25% amplification in discovery/OOS but near-zero standalone
Full formulation consistently strongest but not by a wide margin over Comp A
Validation anomalous for all three groups
Neither cleanly interaction-real nor cleanly component-dominated
notes: MIXED_INCONCLUSIVE. The W01 conjunction has real but asymmetric structure. Comp A is primary, Comp B amplifies modestly. Not dead, not confirmed.
